summary: Tested new features: Custom Branding Fields, Financial Year selector, Opening Stock Balance. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: KMS+FY selectors in header, Custom Fields with Left/Center/Right alignment, Opening Stock with 8 item types.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/branding validates max 6 fields and position (left/center/right) - defaults invalid to 'center'
GET /api/fy-settings returns both active_fy (KMS) and financial_year (FY Apr-Mar)
GET /api/opening-stock returns all 8 stock items (paddy, rice, bran, kunda, broken, kanki, husk, frk)
PUT /api/opening-stock validates admin role and handles invalid values gracefully (converts to 0)
Frontend header shows KMS (amber) and FY (emerald) dropdowns side by side
Settings page has Custom Fields section with add/remove/position UI and live preview
Opening Stock section shows all 8 item inputs with KMS/FY context
seed_data_creation: Test branding fields and opening stock created during tests - no cleanup needed as they are settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified: 1) Custom Branding Fields (max 6) with label/value/position stored in db.branding collection, synced to db.settings for backward compat. 2) Financial Year selector in header alongside KMS year. 3) Opening Stock Balance for 8 product types per KMS year. All APIs working correctly with proper validation.

branding_custom_fields.details: GET returns custom_fields array, PUT saves with max 6 validation, position defaults to center

fy_settings_financial_year.details: GET returns financial_year alongside active_fy, PUT saves both

opening_stock_balance.details: GET returns 8 stock items, PUT saves with admin validation, handles invalid values

header_fy_selectors.details: KMS (amber) and FY (emerald) dropdowns visible side by side in header

settings_custom_fields_ui.details: Add/remove fields, position dropdown (Left/Center/Right), live preview

settings_opening_stock_ui.details: 8 stock item inputs with KMS/FY context, save button
